author: codex

patch.value: Sentry PM-CLI-2F: classify manifest-proven torn bundle call-time TypeError

Sentry PM-CLI-2F captured registerOperationCommands is not a function during CLI operation-family bootstrap. The existing bundle-integrity boundary recognizes missing-module and missing-export loader errors but not the equivalent call-time shape caused by a mixed bundle generation. Extend diagnosis only when the manifest proves the generation changed or files are missing/hash-invalid; intact bundles must preserve the original TypeError.

TDD covers changed-generation and intact-manifest call-time TypeError paths; focused and full 100/100/100/100 coverage pass; packed installed CLI operation smoke passes; live Sentry/telemetry gate returns zero critical/high blockers after resolution.
Manifest-proven mixed bundle generations produce bundle_integrity_torn_install; intact runtime TypeErrors remain genuine blocking failures.
PM-CLI-2F remained an unresolved high because the call-time 'is not a function' shape bypassed the diagnostic matcher.
A concurrent/partial install can abort CLI startup without the actionable reinstall diagnostic and blocks the release reliability gate.

value.author: codex
value.text: Duplicate check: searched all statuses for Sentry PM-CLI-2F, torn bundle, registerOperationCommands, and call-time TypeError. No exact item exists. Closed pm-wfvq remains the completed canonical manifest-diagnostic implementation; this item records a newly observed error-shape gap and links that lineage plus standing release-health reminder pm-7zs0.

message: Track live Sentry call-time torn-bundle diagnostic gap

author: codex
message: Start TDD implementation for manifest-proven call-time bundle failures

value.note: TDD regression for intact and changed-generation TypeError paths

value.author: codex
value.text: TDD evidence: the new PM-CLI-2F regression failed before implementation because the call-time TypeError returned undefined; after extending the candidate error-shape matcher, all 8 focused tests pass. Classification remains fail-closed because an intact manifest returns undefined and only manifest-proven generation drift or file integrity failure emits bundle_integrity_torn_install.

value.author: codex
value.text: Bundle-generation races can surface after module loading as call-time TypeErrors when a stale importer receives a changed export shape. Candidate-message matching may include this shape safely only behind the existing atomic manifest proof; message text alone must never classify or suppress it.

value.author: codex
value.text: Verification evidence: pnpm build and the full static quality gate passed; all 334 test files and 6072 tests passed with literal all-source coverage at 100% statements (40971/40971), branches (28813/28813), functions (8317/8317), and lines (39850/39850). A packed tarball installed into /tmp/tmp.GMtlHlGpWu successfully ran init, create, list-open, and health --check-only with one intact item/history stream and zero integrity or lock warnings, directly exercising operation-family registration from the consumer artifact.

author: codex

patch.value: PR #637 merged to main at ad7c1c36 after all hosted CI, coverage, security, smoke, platform, and benchmark checks completed successfully. Local full coverage remained 100/100/100/100; packed installed CLI operations passed; Sentry PM-CLI-2F was resolved after deployment of the main fix and the strict live reliability gate now reports critical=0, high=0, telemetry error rate=0.33 percent, and zero failures missing error_code.

Extended the bundle-integrity candidate matcher to recognize call-time missing-function failures while retaining atomic manifest drift or file-integrity proof as the mandatory classification boundary.

message: Record merged-head and live reliability resolution

All available hosted CI checks were green, including merged 100% coverage, CodeQL, Semgrep, Trivy, TruffleHog, static/typecheck/compat/smoke gates, Windows, macOS, Ubuntu, docs, and benchmarks. Sentry PM-CLI-2F is resolved; the strict 14-day Sentry plus seven-day telemetry gate passes with zero critical/high issues, 0.33% finish error rate, and zero missing error-code rows.

patch.value: Manifest-proven call-time torn-bundle diagnosis is merged, fully tested, consumer-proven, and live reliability is green.
